ABOUT KHELID

Born from a love of football and a belief that every fan deserves access to the jerseys they love — at prices they can afford.

OUR STORY

Khelid Jerseys was founded with one simple mission: to bring authentic and premium-quality football jerseys to fans around the world at local, affordable prices.

We source directly from trusted manufacturers and suppliers, cutting out the middleman and passing those savings directly to you. Whether you're a die-hard supporter of a local club or a global football fan, we have the jersey for you.

Our team is made up of passionate football lovers who understand the connection between a fan and their jersey. We're dedicated to providing not just great products, but an exceptional shopping experience.

SHIPPING & RETURNS

We ship worldwide with fast, reliable delivery options.

📦

Standard Shipping

Available to 50+ countries. Tracked delivery with updates at every step.

7–14 business days · $4.99
🚀

Express Shipping

Need it fast? Express shipping gets your jersey to you in record time.

3–5 business days · $12.99
🌍

Free Shipping

Enjoy free standard shipping on all orders over $75 — no code needed.

Orders over $75 · FREE
📍

Order Tracking

Every order comes with full tracking. Get SMS/email updates automatically.

Included on all orders

🔄 Return Policy

  • Returns accepted within 30 days of delivery
  • Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original packaging
  • Size exchanges are free — we'll cover the return shipping
  • Refunds processed within 5–7 business days after we receive the item
  • Personalized / name-printed jerseys are non-refundable

🌍 Countries We Ship To

  • United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Australia, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Netherlands, Belgium, Portugal, Brazil, Mexico, Japan, South Africa, UAE, and 35+ more countries.
  • Can't see your country at checkout? Contact us — we'll do our best to help.

SIZE GUIDE

All measurements are in centimeters. For the best fit, measure yourself and compare to the chart below.

Size Chest (cm) Waist (cm) Length (cm) US Size
XS84–8870–7466Extra Small
S88–9274–7868Small
M92–9678–8270Medium
L96–10082–8672Large
XL100–10486–9074X-Large
2XL104–11090–9676XX-Large
3XL110–11896–10478XXX-Large

📏 How to Measure

  • Chest: Measure around the fullest part of your chest, under your arms.
  • Waist: Measure around your natural waistline.
  • Length: Measure from the top of your shoulder to your desired hem length.
  • If you're between sizes, we recommend sizing up for a more relaxed fit.
  • Youth sizes available — contact us for the youth size chart.
